case_title: ANNIE LAM ET AL VS. KEVIN HA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-25-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-25-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT EXCEPT BOTH MINORS WHO WERE NOT PRESENT AT TODAY HEARING. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
GUARDIAN AD LITEM APPLICATION FOR JADI HO, A MINOR FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAM, ANNIE
GUARDIAN AD LITEM APPLICATION FOR REMI HO, A MINOR FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAM, ANNIE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HO, JADI , A MINOR HO, REMI , A MINOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HA, KEVIN $4,080.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,130.00, THE CLAIM OF ANNIE LAM IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF THE TWO MINORS, REMI HO & JADI HO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
